property.name: agentApiName
property.label: Agent API Name
property.description: API Name of the Agentforce agent to invoke.

property.name: manualOnly
property.label: Manual only (do not auto-send)
property.description: When enabled, incoming customer messages are shown but NOT automatically sent to the agent; use the Ask button to send manually.

property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Card Title
property.description: Heading shown at the top of the component.

property.name: height
property.label: Height (px)
property.description: Height of the chat area in pixels.

property.name: supervisorChatUrl
property.label: Supervisor Chat URL
property.description: URL embedded as an iframe in the Supervisor Chat tab.

property.name: supervisorTabLabel
property.label: Supervisor Tab Label
property.description: Label shown on the second tab.

property.name: showDiagnostics
property.label: Show diagnostics
property.description: When enabled, shows status/running-user/error detail under replies that are empty or failed. Use for troubleshooting only.
